name: Rice Meatloaf- Uncle Ben
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients together until well blended.
2. Pack the mixture into a 9x5 (2L) loaf pan and cover with foil.
3. Bake at 350°F (180°C) for 1-1/4 to 1-1/2 hours, or until the loaf is well-browned and meat is cooked through with an internal temperature of 106°F (70°C).
4. Remove the foil after 30 minutes of baking.
5. Drain off excess fat.
6. Let the meatloaf rest for 5 minutes before slicing to serve.
